scripts.dist:win: rm -rf dist-electron .next && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-standalone.js --platform=win32 --arch=x64 && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:mac: rm -rf dist-electron .next && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-standalone.js && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: rm -rf dist-electron .next && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-standalone.js --platform=linux --arch=x64 && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --linux --x64
